---
title: "Martin Sjogard"
format: html
---

## About Me

I am a clinical data scientist working as a postdoctoral research fellow in the [Sleep, Cognition and Neuropsychology](https://manoachlab.mgh.harvard.edu/) lab at [Massachusetts General Hospital](https://www.massgeneral.org/) and at [Harvard Medical School](https://hms.harvard.edu/).

My expertise is in statistical and computational analysis of health-related data, with a focus on neuroimaging and electrophysiological signals in neuropsychiatric disorders.

---

## Featured Blog Posts

- **[Power Analysis for Linear Mixed Models: What You Need to Know](posts/power-analysis-lmm/index.qmd)**
- **[Permutation-Based FWER Correction, Part 1: Hypothesis Testing Fundamentals](posts/fwer-correction-part1/index.qmd)**
